title: HTML and XML content parsers
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 6.2.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] HTML and XML parsers implement the content-parser trait and feed the same canonical structure.
- [hard] A content rule (e.g. section/item check) works identically across md, html, and xml inputs in tests.
